name: Tohoku Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Tohoku Steel Co., Ltd. manufactures, processes, and distributes various types of special steel products in Japan. It offers heat resistant and stainless steel materials, magnetic materials, and low thermal expansion alloys; special alloys, including ferrous and nonferrous alloys; precision processed products, such as cold-/warm-forged NNS and machined products, machined products, and processed composite products; heat treatment products; and automatic coercive force meters. The company was incorporated in 1937 and is based in Shibata, Japan.
